allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add unified Swarm Health dashboard with guard metrics, trophy system, and resource monitoring

- Add _GuardMetrics singleton to session_guard.py tracking activations, cascades, and unhandled exceptions
- Add orphans_reaped counter to process_registry.py
- Add GET /api/v1/system/resource-health endpoint \(guard metrics, process stats, budget, session saturation\)
- Add GET /api/v1/awards/summary endpoint \(category/tier breakdowns, recent unlocks, top recipients\)
- Add ResourceHealth and AwardsSummary TypeScript types + API client functions
- Create TrophyShowcase component \(tier distribution bar, 12-category grid, recent unlocks, leaderboard\)
- Create SwarmHealthPage with 5 tabs \(Overview, Providers, Agents, Resources, Trophies\)
- Fix duplicate SystemHealthDashboard import and route in router.tsx
- Redirect /system-health and /metrics to /swarm-health
- Update SideNav link to /swarm-health
- Include prior session work: RAII guards, db_pool, drill books, vector store, corps config, image gen, lifecycle transitions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
